name: aws_neuron
explanation: AWS Neuron monitoring relies on the `neuron-monitor` companion tool, which exposes Prometheus-formatted metrics on the well-known port `8000/metrics` on the EC2/Inferentia/Trainium instance. The check is `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` and the spec uses `template: instances/openmetrics` with a single endpoint. No authentication is required; an OpenMetrics port-scan against `http://%%host%%:8000/metrics` is sufficient where `neuron-monitor-prometheus` is running.
notes: Pattern A. Discovery presumes the user has installed and started the neuron-monitor Prometheus exporter; the integration itself only consumes its endpoint.
